segments.text: Hello, thank you for calling customer support. My name is Alex and I will help you today.
I'm calling about an order that arrived damaged.
The package was delivered yesterday, but the screen is cracked. I would like refund or replacement as soon as possible.
you can reach me at john.mit and example.com. Also, my phone number is 555.

full_text: Hello, thank you for calling customer support. My name is Alex and I will help you today. I'm calling about an order that arrived damaged. The package was delivered yesterday, but the screen is cracked. I would like refund or replacement as soon as possible. The order number is A. X19. 75 you can reach me at john.mit and example.com. Also, my phone number is 555. 0-1. by nine. Thank you.
